# Pull Request

## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Changes Made
- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing
Describe how you tested these changes:
- [ ] Tested locally with sample markdown file
- [ ] Tested in a GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Added/updated tests
- [ ] All existing tests pass

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and committed the `dist/` directory
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (README.md, SETUP.md, etc.)
- [ ] I have updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have tested my changes
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have added comments to complex code sections

## Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes.

## Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.
